reading.title: Reading: Experience vs detail
reading.passage: I have visited Hue before. I visited it last summer, with my family. I have also tried Hue cuisine. I tried it three years ago, at a small restaurant.

questions.question: The writer visited Hue last summer.
When did the writer try Hue cuisine?

reading.title: Reading: How coffee is made
reading.passage: Coffee is grown in the highlands. It is then processed in factories and packaged. After that, it is delivered to shops and distributed to many countries around the world.

questions.question: Coffee is grown in the highlands.
questions.explanation: Câu đầu nêu rõ điều này.

questions.question: What happens after coffee is packaged?
questions.explanation: "After that, it is delivered to shops".
